title: Fix OAuth open redirect in terminal/server.py

log.context: Fix OAuth open redirect in terminal/server.py

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**File:** `/home/clungus/work/terminal/server.py`

**The vulnerability:** Line 145 used `'.clung.us' in next_url` which passes for `https://clung.us.evil.com` since that string does contain `.clung.us`.

**The fix — two changes:**

1. Added `import urllib.parse` at the top of the imports.

2. Added a `_is_safe_redirect(url)` helper (inserted before `login_handler`) that uses `urllib.parse.urlparse` to extract the actual hostname and validates it is ex...(truncated)
